MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Richard L. Beckman of Beckman & Marquez, LLP, 495-8500, appearing for plaintiffs and moving parties

No other appearances on this matter. Mr. Beckman presented the Court with a valid proof of service. PLAINTIFFS JEFFREY INOCENCIO and JOCELYN INOCENCIO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT was granted as no opposition had been filed. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-06-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jak Marquez of Beckman and Marquez, LLP, 495-8500, appearing for plaintiff and responding party

No other appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CARRIE SMITH'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled, 5 days to answer. Order signed in open Court. (301/PHA/PM) JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER, BELDON YEE, CSR# 2647
